vocab.meaning: bắt đầu theo học một văn bằng về ngành...
vocab.example: I decided to embark on a degree in International Relations to better understand global politics.

vocab.meaning: các học phần cốt lõi/bắt buộc
vocab.example: My major consists of several core modules that focus specifically on advanced macroeconomics.
In addition to my main subjects, I’ve taken several elective courses in digital marketing to broaden my skillset.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nhiêm túc trong học thuật
vocab.example: The academic rigor of this course is quite intense, requiring late nights in the library.
Astrophysics is a fascinating field of inquiry that constantly challenges our understanding of space.
What I love most about my major is the practical application of theories in real-world scenarios.

vocab.meaning: chuyên ngành hẹp/sự chuyên môn hóa
vocab.example: My current specialization is in corporate law, which involves analyzing complex business contracts.

vocab.meaning: theo đuổi sự nghiệp trong lĩnh vực...
vocab.example: I am studying Graphic Design because I intend to pursue a career in the creative industries.
This major has significantly sharpened my analytical skills, especially when dealing with large datasets.

vocab.meaning: đồ án tốt nghiệp/dự án cuối khóa
vocab.example: I am currently working on my capstone project, which involves designing a sustainable urban garden.
